name: Williams Partners, L.P.
description: Williams Partners, L.P. was a major energy infrastructure master limited partnership that operated a vast network of natural gas gathering, processing, and transmission assets. Headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, the company played a critical role in the midstream energy sector by connecting natural gas production to markets across the United States. In 2018, the partnership was acquired by its parent company, The Williams Companies, Inc., in a transaction that consolidated Williams' midstream assets under a single corporate structure to streamline operations and enhance financial flexibility within the evolving energy landscape.
